specific_mechanism: Spectrum-selective + directional redistribution at input boundary; useful wavelengths forward, unproductive wavelengths back.
llm_application: IRIDO-LLM: pre-attention frequency-band classifier + depth-router; forward-scatter productive eigenbands deeper into LLM stack; back-reject unproductive ones; routes spectrum + direction together.
novelty_claim: XTF (2602.14536) does token-level filtering; AFF (2307.14008) is single-stage frequency mixer. IRIDO-LLM combines spectral classification + depth-routing at pre-attention boundary — but related work in MoE-routing + frequency-attention literature may cover.
